title: Autumnal Birch Forest (Programmer Art)
description: Brings the colors and feelings of autumn to birch forests in the style of Programmer Art :3
body:
![Animated Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8684a7e1b431af961d83d2a4d2dd8263b8e2718.gif)

🍂 **About**

  This resource pack changes the birch forests to a more autumnal/fall aesthetic in programmer art style; mostly a color change and a retexture of the birch leaves.

Feel free to look at the gallery for pictures! Thanks and have fun!!

⚙️ **Recomended Resource Packs** (and the ones used in the pictures)

  Go give them some love <3

-Programmer Art Continuation Project [PACP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp)
  
-Fresh Animations [FA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

-Fresh Programmer Animations [FPA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-fresh-animations)

-Simple Grass Flowers [SGF](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-grass-flowers)

-Birch Mushrooms [BM](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/birch-mushrooms)

⚙️ **Recomended Mods**

   You absolutely need this one for the falling leaves to be the right color plus is a really cool mod, give it a try!! :333

-Falling Leaves [FL](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
